chunks.label: Travel itinerary - September 10, 2026
chunks.text: September 10, 2026 Thursday. Departure from the United States. Leave home and travel to Newark Liberty International Airport (EWR). Arrive at the airport approximately 3 hours before departure. Check in for the United Airlines flight. Complete security screening and immigration procedures. Relax at the United Club Lounge before boarding. Board the overnight flight from Newark (EWR) to Rome Fiumicino Airport (FCO). Enjoy dinner and get some rest on the overnight flight to Rome.

chunks.label: Travel itinerary - September 11, 2026
chunks.text: September 11, 2026 Friday. Arrival in Rome. Arrive at Rome Fiumicino Airport (FCO). Take the Leonardo Express train to Roma Termini. Leave luggage at the hotel. Enjoy lunch in Rome. Visit St. Peter's Basilica. Hotel check-in is available after 3:00 PM. Free evening to relax and recover from the overnight flight.

chunks.label: Travel itinerary - September 12, 2026
chunks.text: September 12, 2026 Saturday. Amalfi Coast and Positano Day Tour, approximately 15-hour tour. 6:30 AM depart from the hotel. 7:20 AM board the tour coach from Rome. Scenic drive along the Amalfi Coast. Visit Positano. Free time for sightseeing, shopping, and photography. Return to Rome at approximately 10:00 PM.

chunks.label: Travel itinerary - September 13, 2026
chunks.text: September 13, 2026 Sunday. Day 1 Embarkation Day on Odyssey of the Seas. 8:30 AM hotel check-out. Travel by train to Civitavecchia Cruise Port, approximately 1.5 hours. Arrive at the cruise terminal before noon. Board Royal Caribbean's Odyssey of the Seas. Enjoy complimentary embarkation lunch. Complete the Muster Drill. Turn Mobile Data Roaming OFF. Explore the ship and become familiar with its facilities. Attend the Sail Away Party. 4:00 PM cruise departs from Civitavecchia.

chunks.label: Travel itinerary - September 14, 2026
chunks.text: September 14, 2026 Monday. Day 2 At Sea. Enjoy the ship. Activities include hot tub, swimming pools, RipCord by iFLY, FlowRider surf simulator, bumper cars, rock climbing wall, Broadway-style shows, shopping, and relaxing with friends. Evening is Elegant Night. Dress in formal attire and enjoy an elegant dinner in the Main Dining Room. Good evening for group photos.

chunks.label: Travel itinerary - September 15, 2026
chunks.text: September 15, 2026 Tuesday. Day 3 Santorini, Greece. Highlights include Oia and Fira. 7:00 AM collect Tender Boat Ticket. Approximately 11:00 AM board the Tender Boat. Take a Water Taxi to Oia. Explore Blue Dome Churches, windmills, whitewashed streets, shopping, and photography. Continue to Fira. At the end of the visit, ride the Cable Car down to Old Port. Take the Tender Boat back to the ship.

chunks.label: Travel itinerary - September 16, 2026
chunks.text: September 16, 2026 Wednesday. Day 4 Kusadasi, Turkey. Private Tour to Ephesus. Join a private tour to explore the ancient city of Ephesus. Tour duration approximately 5 hours. Highlights include Library of Celsus, Great Theatre, ancient Roman streets, and other famous archaeological ruins. After the tour, free time for shopping near the cruise port. Return to the ship.

chunks.label: Travel itinerary - September 17, 2026
chunks.text: September 17, 2026 Thursday. Day 5 Mykonos, Greece. Take a Water Taxi to Chora, Mykonos Town. Visit Little Venice, Panagia Paraportiani, and Kato Mili Windmills. Enjoy free time to walk around town, shop, have lunch, and take photos. Return to the ship in the afternoon.

chunks.label: Travel itinerary - September 18, 2026
chunks.text: September 18, 2026 Friday. Day 6 At Sea. Enjoy another relaxing day onboard. Activities include swimming, entertainment, shopping, and relaxation. Evening may include a theme party if scheduled. Second Elegant Night.

chunks.label: Travel itinerary - September 19, 2026
chunks.text: September 19, 2026 Saturday. Day 7 Naples, Italy. 7:00 AM arrive in Naples. 9:45 AM meet the group tour coach. Visit Pompeii for a guided tour approximately 4.5 hours. After returning to Naples, enjoy authentic Neapolitan pizza. Explore the historic city center. Free time for sightseeing and shopping. Return to the ship approximately 1.5 hours before departure.

chunks.label: Travel itinerary - September 20, 2026
chunks.text: September 20, 2026 Sunday. Day 8 Return to Rome. Disembark at Civitavecchia. Travel back to Rome. Leave luggage at the hotel. Enjoy free time exploring Rome. Last-minute shopping. Farewell dinner.

chunks.label: Travel itinerary - September 21, 2026
chunks.text: September 21, 2026 Monday. Return to the United States. 8:00 AM hotel check-out. Take the Leonardo Express to Rome Fiumicino Airport (FCO). Board the flight back to the United States.
